Computer Science and Engineering Directory

About our faculty and staff

Our nationally recognized faculty, researchers and professional staff are dedicated to excellence in research, education, innovation and service. Learn more about the individuals who make up the Department of Computer Science and Engineering by visiting their profiles.

Ariful Azad

  • Associate Professor, Computer Science & Engineering
  • Office: PETR 215
  • Phone: 979-845-5351
  • Email: ariful@tamu.edu
